name: Yosef [DW]
description:
The Scavenger Boss from Decaying Winter. All the lore in his memory is pulled from the Doc and the info revealed off of DoE interactions, only slightly tweaked (not modified) to hopefully avoid wonky citations.

////////////////////////////////////////////////////

What's important is on the introduction, it was edited and shortened so that your role is vague, so whether you are an agent, scav, raider, cultist.. You choose it!

////////////////////////////////////////////////////

edit: context size diminished due to accidental copy paste clutter when i was adjusting world info. oops (don't worry, nothing actually changed)
